  RETURN "Previous: " & IF(

REFERENCED_EXPRESSION:
VAR today   = TODAY()
  VAR p       = [Selected Period]
  VAR weekday = WEEKDAY(today, 2)
  VAR twoWeeksAgoMonday = today - weekday + 1 - 14
  VAR firstThisMonth = DATE(YEAR(today), MONTH(today), 1)
  RETURN IF(p = "Week", twoWeeksAgoMonday, EDATE(firstThisMonth, -2))
